eiswein_craft.title: Craft Eiswein (Vinery — use frozen/ice grapes in the barrel process)

pack_bottles.title: Pack at least 4 Eiswein bottles in your inventory before entering the Nether

subtitle.text: The grapes froze before they were harvested. That was not an accident.

description: CH.04 · THE ICE WINE
▸ Eiswein is the rarest wine in Vinery.
You need grapes that froze.
You need winter. Or snow biome cultivation.
You need patience.
◈ EISWEIN PROPERTIES
└ ★ FULLY RESTORES HEALTH on consumption
(this is not a typo — full heart bar)
└ Also provides: short Regeneration effect
└ Also provides: minor warmth (Cold Sweat)
└ Stack weight: glass bottle
└ Best emergency heal in Ch04-Ch09
◈ HOW TO CRAFT EISWEIN
└ Grow grapes in a cold biome (tundra, snowy slopes)
OR harvest grapes and expose to snow/ice
└ Ferment ice-grapes in barrel — longer than regular
└ Output: 1-2 bottles per barrel
└ Slow to produce. Worth the time.
◈ NETHER PREPARATION
└ ▲ Ch06 Nether entry — pack Eiswein
└ Fire Resistance potion blocks lava damage
└ Eiswein restores health from non-lava damage
└ Together: survive almost anything in the Nether
▸ Someone left three bottles in a chest by the Nether portal.
They never came back for them.
You may as well take the lesson.
▶ Craft Eiswein [check]
▶ Pack 4 Eiswein bottles for Nether entry [check]
◇ Magma Gelatin (Nether's Delight) gives
sustained fire immunity. Different from Eiswein.
Bring both if you can. Ch06 will test you.
